enabled.description: Enable or disable the classification banner.

addFooter.description: Indicates whether to add a footer to the classification banner.

text.description: The classification banner text must match one of the allowed values (case-insensitive): UNCLASSIFIED, CUI, CONFIDENTIAL, SECRET, TOP SECRET, TOP SECRET//SCI, UNKNOWN, or it can be an empty string or null.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the Admin Apps view in the portal.

extraConfigmapMounts.description: Additional ConfigMap-backed volume mounts for the uds-portal container.

name.description: Name used for both the volume and volumeMount.

mountPath.description: Container path where the ConfigMap content will be mounted.

configMap.description: Name of the ConfigMap to mount.

subPath.description: Optional ConfigMap key to mount as a single file.

readOnly.description: Whether the mount should be read-only.

defaultMode.description: Optional file mode applied to ConfigMap files.

optional.description: Whether the pod should start if the ConfigMap is missing.
